ddls:
CREATE TABLE "animals" (
  "animal_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each animal */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the animal (if applicable) */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the animal was brought into the shelter */,
  "found_location" TEXT /* Location where the animal was found */,
  "intake_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the intake_types table */,
  "intake_condition_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the intake_conditions table */,
  "animal_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the animal_types table */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the animal */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the animal upon intake */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the breeds table */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the animal */,
  "microchip_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for microchipped animals */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Current weight of the animal */,
  "health_history" TEXT /* Notes on any health issues or treatments */,
  "vaccination_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the animal is up-to-date with vaccinations */,
  "spayed_neutered" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the animal has been spayed or neutered */,
  "kennel_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the kennels table to track the current location of the animal */,
  "adoption_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the animal is available for adoption */,
  "adoption_profile_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the adoption_profiles table to link the animal to its adoption profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_kennel_id FOREIGN KEY ("kennel_id") REFERENCES kennels ("kennel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_intake_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("intake_type_id") REFERENCES intake_types ("intake_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_intake_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("intake_condition_id") REFERENCES intake_conditions ("intake_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_animal_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_type_id") REFERENCES animal_types ("animal_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_adoption_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("adoption_profile_id") REFERENCES adoption_profiles ("adoption_profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intake_types" (
  "intake_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intake type */,
  "intake_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the intake type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intake type */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the intake type is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the staff table to track who created the intake type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the intake type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intake_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intake_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intake_conditions" (
  "intake_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intake condition */,
  "intake_condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the intake condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intake condition */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the intake condition is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the staff table to track who created the intake condition */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the intake condition was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intake_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intake_conditions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_types" (
  "animal_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal type */,
  "animal_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the animal type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the animal type */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the animal type is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the staff table to track who created the animal type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the animal type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breeds" (
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breed */,
  "breed_name" TEXT /* Name of the breed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the breed */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the breed is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the staff table to track who created the breed */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the breed was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breeds_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adoptions" (
  "adoption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adoption */,
  "animal_id" TEXT /* ID of the animal being adopted */,
  "adopter_name" TEXT /* Name of the adopter */,
  "adoption_date" TEXT /* Date of adoption */,
  "adoption_fee" TEXT /* Fee paid by the adopter */,
  "adoption_status" TEXT /* Status of the adoption (e.g., Pending, Complete) */,
  "adoption_notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the adoption */,
  "adoption_profile_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the adoption_profiles table to link the adoption to the adoption profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adoption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoptions_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoptions_adoption_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("adoption_profile_id") REFERENCES adoption_profiles ("adoption_profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kennels" (
  "kennel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kennel */,
  "kennel_name" TEXT /* Name of the kennel */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of animals the kennel can hold */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current number of animals in the kennel */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the kennel */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the kennel is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the staff table to track who created the kennel */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the kennel was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kennel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kennels_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adoption_profiles" (
  "adoption_profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adoption profile */,
  "animal_id" TEXT /* ID of the animal */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the animal's profile picture */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the animal */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Activity level of the animal (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "dietary_needs" TEXT /* Dietary needs or preferences of the animal */,
  "special_needs" TEXT /* Special needs or requirements of the animal */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the staff table to track who created the adoption profile */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the adoption profile was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adoption_profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoption_profiles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., Veterinarian, Kennel Staff) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the staff member is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the staff table to track who created the staff member's record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member's record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)
